common.citySearchHint: Try city and country (e.g. Mar del Plata, Argentina)
common.loginToViewRequests: You must sign in to view your requests
common.name: Name
common.howDescription: Brief information about how ViaSonora works
common.howCare: How we care for musicians and owners

features.intro: Enable or disable system features without deploying code (Feature Flags).
features.paymentsDescription: Enables monetization and payments on the platform (stub ready for integration).
features.notificationsDescription: Email or push notifications for requests and messages.
features.expireAutomaticDescription: Posts expire automatically after 30 days (cron job).
features.availabilityValidationDescription: Validates request start/end date and start/end time against the instrument's configured availability (weekdays and time range).
features.homeCardsDescription: Shows the instrument cards carousel and category chips on the home page.

home.title: Find instruments for traveling musicians
home.subtitle: Connect with musicians around the world

instruments.title: My instruments
instruments.whereAvailableHint: Add the locations where this instrument is available for other musicians.
instruments.addOneLocation: Add at least one location where the instrument is available
instruments.addLocationRequired: You must add at least one location
instruments.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this instrument?
instruments.minPhotosRequired: You must upload at least 3 photos
instruments.invalidLocationsAlert: All locations must have a valid city selected. Please select a city from the suggestions.

availability.title: Availability
availability.description: Set the days and times when the instrument is available. If you don't set availability, any date/time will be allowed.
availability.note: Note: Users will need to coordinate instrument handover with you when making a request.

posts.title: My posts
posts.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this post?
posts.formDescription: Publish an instrument so other musicians can find it
posts.notePending: The post will be in PENDING_APPROVAL status until a moderator approves it. Once approved, it will be visible on the map and public listings.
posts.editDescription: Update city and zone. The instrument cannot be changed.
posts.editOnlyWhenPending: You can only edit a post while it is pending approval.
posts.contactOwnerHint: To contact the owner, you must send a request and wait for their approval.
posts.requestPendingMessage: Your request is pending. The owner will receive a notification and respond soon.
posts.requestAcceptedMessage: Your request has been accepted! The owner's contact details are shown above. You can contact them now.
posts.requestDeclinedMessage: Your request was declined by the owner. You can try another instrument or contact the owner directly if you have another way to communicate.
posts.requestCancelledMessage: You have cancelled this request. If you change your mind, you can send a new request.
posts.requestCompletedMessage: This request has been marked as completed.
posts.availabilityCoordinateHint: Users will need to coordinate the instrument handover directly with you.

requests.title: My Requests
requests.description: Manage the requests you have sent and received
requests.noSent: You have not sent any requests
requests.noReceived: You have not received any requests
requests.confirmStatusChange: Are you sure you want to change the status to "{status}"?
requests.messagePlaceholder: Explain your request and when you need the instrument...
requests.accessoriesPlaceholder: Specify if you need additional accessories...
requests.availabilityCalendarHint: Available days are highlighted in the calendar. You will need to coordinate directly with the owner.
requests.errorMessageMinChars: Message must be at least 10 characters
requests.errorSelectStartDate: You must select a start date
requests.errorSelectEndDate: You must select an end date
requests.errorEndAfterStart: End date must be after start date
requests.errorEndAfterStartTime: End date and time must be after start date and time
requests.errorDuplicateRequest: You have already sent a request for this instrument. Please wait for the owner's response.

profile.title: My profile
profile.description: Complete your information and accept the terms and conditions
profile.name: Name
profile.contactLocationHint: Where are you? This location will be used so other users can contact you when you accept a request.
profile.citySearchPlaceholder: Type the city to see suggestions...
profile.citySearchHint: Start typing and choose an option from the list to fill city and country.
profile.zoneHint: You can specify an additional zone or neighborhood if you wish
profile.termsDialogDescription: Please read the following terms and conditions carefully before using our platform.
profile.invalidFileType: Invalid file type. Only JPEG, PNG and WebP are allowed.
profile.fileTooBig: File is too large. Maximum size: 5MB.

reports.title: Report Post
reports.description: Help us maintain the quality of the platform. Your report will be reviewed by our moderators.
reports.reasonRequired: Please select a reason for the report
reports.commentPlaceholder: Provide more details about the report...
reports.successMessage: Thank you for your report. Our moderators will review it soon.
reports.errorAlreadyReported: You have already reported this post
reports.adminDescription: Manage and moderate platform posts and reports
